separation_note: This is a SEPARATE asset from the shared persona index (shared-utils/prebuilt-index/INDEX-MANIFEST.json). Different corpus (the 36 email-library entries), different release tag (email-index-v*), different sqlite. The two indexes are never merged and never share a release asset.
model_pin_note: Model + dims are PINNED against the gemini-embedding-001 EOL risk. gemini-embedding-2 @ 3072 is the GA model; a client box downloads the computed vectors and NEVER re-embeds, so the pin protects every box from the EOL model swap.
embed_once_note: EMBED ONCE on the operator box (index/build-and-publish.sh — needs gh auth + a client-supplied Google/Gemini key for the DELTA only). Client boxes provision via index/provision-email-index.sh -> provision_email_index(): download the sha256-verified vectors, NEVER re-embed per box (furnace-safe). Retrieval = tags[] (lexical, email_matcher.py) UNION embeddings (semantic, EmbeddingReranker).
asset_pending_note: chunk_count / sha256 / build_date / gz_size_bytes are populated by the FIRST operator-box build-and-publish.sh run; asset_rebuild_required flips to false once the email-index-v1.0.0 asset is published. Until then client boxes keyword-degrade to the lexical catalog (email_matcher.py) — never a per-box re-embed.

schema.columns_note: Email rows carry entry_id (catalog id), entry_type (framework|buyer-type|objective|persona-style|sequence), and framework_id where applicable, so retrieval can filter by type/framework without a full scan.
